t: New 900-series: smart cameras, 3D and edge controllers
d: The catalog adds the 900-series machine-vision cameras, 3D profiling and edge controllers for higher-throughput inspection cells.

t: gyutron.com is now available in English, German and Japanese
d: The full product catalog, solutions and support are now localized across three languages for our global customers.

t: OEM / ODM program open for qualified volume projects
d: Custom configurations, firmware, housings, connectors and private labeling are available for qualified volume programs.
